Backends (Host Adapter)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne can route LLM-backed operations — consolidation (","$L7",") and structured fact extraction — through a ","$L8"," instead of its own remote/local chain. This is essential when Mnemosyne runs inside ","$L9"," and the user has an ","$La"," (ChatGPT, Codex) that cannot be reached via ","$Lb","."]}],"\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27"],["$L28"],"$L29"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@2a"]},null,false,"$@2a"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L2b",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$2c",["$L2d"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"a7Z8buxtE-LVtBntTgeEr"}
2e:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"OutletBoundary"]
2f:"$Sreact.suspense"
32:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
34:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]
8:["$","strong",null,{"children":"host-provided backend"}]
9:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes"}]
a:["$","strong",null,{"children":"OAuth-backed provider"}]
b:["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"The standalone LLM path expects an OpenAI-compatible URL plus API key:"}]
e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1\nMNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY=sk-...\n"}]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["OAuth/session-backed providers like ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openai-codex"}]," use provider-specific routing, headers, OAuth refresh, and Codex Responses API translation. Reproducing all of that inside Mnemosyne would be heavy. Reusing what Hermes already authenticates is dramatically simpler."]}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}]
11:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"┌─────────────────┐     ┌──────────────────────┐     ┌─────────────────┐\n│   Mnemosyne     │────▶│  Host LLM Backend    │────▶│  Hermes aux     │\n│   sleep()       │     │  (registered at init) │     │  call_llm()     │\n│   extract()     │     │                       │     │  (OAuth, Codex) │\n└─────────────────┘     └──────────────────────┘     └─────────────────┘\n"}]}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":["The backend is a tiny ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"one-method interface"}],":"]}]
13:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"class LLMBackend:\n    name: str\n\n    def complete(self, prompt, *, max_tokens, temperature, timeout,\n                 provider=None, model=None) -> str | None:\n        ...\n"}]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}]
15:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Required: opt in to the host backend\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true\n\n# Optional overrides (Hermes auto-resolution otherwise)\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_PROVIDER=openai-codex\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_MODEL=gpt-5.1-mini\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX=32000\n"}]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"HOST_LLM_ENABLED"}]," is unset or false, behavior is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"identical to before"}]," — remote URL → local GGUF → AAAK."]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fallback Chain"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true"}],":"]}]
19:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-text","children":"0. Host backend (if registered)\n   ↓ on failure: skip remote URL entirely (A3 rule)\n1. Local GGUF (ctransformers / llama-cpp-python)\n   ↓ on failure\n2. Return None / [] — caller falls back to AAAK encoding\n"}]}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=false"}]," or unset:"]}]
1b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-text","children":"0. Remote OpenAI-compatible API (if MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL set)\n   ↓ on failure\n1. Local GGUF\n   ↓ on failure\n2. AAAK encoding\n"}]}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The \"Host-Skips-Remote\" Rule (A3)"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["When the host attempt produces no usable text (errors, empty response, no extractable content), the ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"remote URL is skipped entirely"}],". The fallback goes straight to local GGUF."]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["This prevents Mnemosyne from accidentally routing memory content to a stale ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," the user forgot to clear after switching to Hermes."]}]
1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"For Other Agents"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"Any host can register its own backend:"}]
21:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.core.llm_backends import LLMBackend, set_host_llm_backend\n\nclass MyAgentBackend:\n    name = \"my-agent\"\n\n    def complete(self, prompt, *, max_tokens, temperature, timeout,\n                 provider=None, model=None):\n        # Route through your authenticated client\n        return text_or_none\n\nset_host_llm_backend(MyAgentBackend())\n"}]}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Session Shutdown"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_session_end()"}]," hook runs sleep/consolidation in a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"daemon thread"}]," with a 15-second join timeout. If consolidation cannot finish in time (e.g., a slow host LLM call), the join returns and Hermes shutdown proceeds unblocked. The daemon thread continues in the background and is reaped when the process exits."]}]
24:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Temperature Contracts"}]
25:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Operation"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Temperature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Reason"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fact extraction"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Deterministic — avoids near-duplicate facts on re-ingest"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Paraphrasing variance is acceptable"}]]}]]}]]}]
26:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}]
27:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/configuration#host-llm-backend-hermes-integration","children":"Host LLM Configuration"}]," — env vars for the host LLM backend"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/sleep-consolidation","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]," — how consolidation uses the LLM backend"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/fact-extraction","children":"Fact Extraction"}]," — structured fact extraction with host routing"]}],"\n"]}]
